sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n82424" key="peritto/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">περιττός</orth>, <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">περιτρῡπ-άκις</orth>, <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">περιτρῡπ-εύω</orth>, <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">περιτρῡ´π-ωμα</orth>, etc., <abbr TEIform="abbr">v.</abbr> <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">περισς</itype>-.</entryFree>
